The gold price, tracked by the SPDR Gold Shares ETF, hit its lowest level since March 30, while the S&P 500 is losing ground for a third straight session. Futures markets are pricing in a longer disruption, with crude oil for December delivery hitting a conflict high on Monday before easing slightly to $84.40 on Tuesday after Trump said he had called off an attack.
